name: MRI Conditionality in SureScan System
description: The SureScan system ensures MRI conditionality through three mechanisms: Filtered feedthrough technology filters high-frequency RF energy to prevent heating and pacing inhibition, magnetic switch detection detects the MRI static field automatically, and SureScan mode operation switches to asynchronous pacing mode during scanning to avoid oversensing from gradient field switching and RF pulses. This conditionality allows the pacemaker to be used safely in an MRI environment.
